x.Description: Electrode x-coordinate in the coordinate system defined in coordsystem.json

y.Description: Electrode y-coordinate in the coordinate system defined in coordsystem.json

z.Description: Electrode z-coordinate in the coordinate system defined in coordsystem.json

type.Description: Electrode type (e.g., ECoG, SEEG, EEG). Note: official BIDS requires type in channels.tsv; here we keep it as an extra column for clarity.

group.Description: Electrode group/array label (e.g., Left_Sheet, Right_Sheet, Left_Ref, Right_Ref)

impedance.Description: Electrode impedance measured prior to recording.
